mission.title: metallb: Enhancement; Controller support for the updated K8s dual-stack API (v1.20)
mission.description: Enhancement; Controller support for the updated K8s dual-stack API (v1.20). Requested by 5+ users.

steps.title: Check current metallb deployment
steps.description:
Verify your metallb version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n metallb-system -l app.kubernetes.io/name=metallb
helm list -n metallb-system 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working metallb installation.

steps.title: Review metallb configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant MetalLB configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n metallb-system
kubectl get ipaddresspools.metallb.io -n metallb-system
```
MetalLB controller supports the current dual-stack API in Kubernetes where separate services for IPv4 and IPv6 must be defined. With the updated K8s dual-stack API (v1.20+), services can request dual-stack IPs using `ipFamilyPolicy: PreferDualStack`.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Enhancement; Controller support for the updated K8s…
steps.description:
The fix adds controller support for the updated Kubernetes dual-stack Service API (v1.20+).

Example dual-stack service:
```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: svc-preferdual-lb
spec:
  ipFamilyPolicy: PreferDualStack
  selector:
    app: my-app
  ports:
  - port: 5001
  type: LoadBalancer
```

Verify dual-stack assignment:
```bash
kubectl get svc svc-preferdual-lb -o jsonpath='{.spec.clusterIPs}'
```

steps.title: Upgrade metallb to include the fix
steps.description:
If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade MetalLB:
```bash
helm repo update
helm upgrade metallb metallb/metallb --namespace metallb-system
```
Verify the upgrade:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n metallb-system
helm list -n metallb-system
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n metallb-system -l app.kubernetes.io/name=metallb
kubectl get events -n metallb-system --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Enhancement; Controller support for the updated K8s…" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: Yep, the code is now in.  you can check the dev version by deploying directly from main, or wait for the next release.
codeSnippets:
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: mserver-ipv6
spec:
  ipFamily: IPv6
  selector:
    app: mserver
  ports:
  - port: 5001
  type: LoadBalancer
  loadBalancerIP: "1000::"

apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: svc-preferdual-lb
spec:
  ipFamilyPolicy: PreferDualStack
  selector:
    app: mconnect-daemonset
  ports:
  - port: 5001
  type: LoadBalancer

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with metallb installed or the issue environment reproducible.
